member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Bip32
member.summary: BIP-32 HD key derivation (Secp256k1 curve). Used to derive a 32-byte private key from a seed and path. Sui uses m/54'/784'/... for Secp256k1 and m/74'/784'/... for Secp256r1 (same derivation, use private key only).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Bip32.DerivePrivateKey(System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Derives a 32-byte private key for the given BIP-32 path from a 64-byte seed.

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519HdKey
member.summary: SLIP-0010 Ed25519 HD key derivation from a seed. Used to derive a 32-byte secret key and chain code from a path.

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519HdKey.DerivedKeys
member.summary: Result of Ed25519 HD derivation: secret key and chain code.

member.name: P:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519HdKey.DerivedKeys.Key
member.summary: 32-byte secret key (seed for Ed25519 keypair).

member.name: P:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519HdKey.DerivedKeys.ChainCode
member.summary: 32-byte chain code for further derivation.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519HdKey.DerivePath(System.String,System.String,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Derives key and chain code for the given path from a hex seed.
member.param: SLIP-0010 path (e.g. m/44'/784'/0'/0'/0'); all segments must be hardened.
64-byte seed as hex string (e.g. from BIP39 mnemonic).
Offset added to each path segment (default 0x80000000 for hardened).

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519Impl
member.summary: Ed25519 sign/verify and key derivation using BouncyCastle (32-byte seed as private key).

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519Constants
member.summary: Default Ed25519 derivation path for Sui (BIP44-like: m/44'/784'/0'/0'/0').

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519Keypair
member.summary: Ed25519 keypair for signing Sui transactions and messages.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519Keypair.#ctor(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Creates a new keypair from raw 32-byte secret key (seed). The public key is derived.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519Keypair.FromSecretKey(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a keypair from a Sui Bech32 private key string (suiprivkey1...).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519Keypair.FromSecretKey(System.Byte[],System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a keypair from raw 32-byte secret key.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519Keypair.Generate
member.summary: Generates a new random Ed25519 keypair.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519Keypair.DeriveKeypair(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Derives an Ed25519 keypair from a mnemonic phrase and optional derivation path. Path must be SLIP-0010 form m/44'/784'/{account}'/{change}'/{address}'.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519Keypair.DeriveKeypairFromSeed(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Derives an Ed25519 keypair from a 64-byte seed given as hex string and optional derivation path. Path must be SLIP-0010 form m/44'/784'/{account}'/{change}'/{address}'.
member.param: 64-byte seed as hex string (128 hex chars, optional 0x prefix).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519Keypair.DeriveKeypairFromSeed(System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Derives an Ed25519 keypair from a 64-byte raw seed and optional derivation path.

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519PublicKey
member.summary: Ed25519 public key (32 bytes) for Sui.

member.name: F:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519PublicKey.Size
member.summary: Size of an Ed25519 public key in bytes.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519PublicKey.#ctor(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Creates an Ed25519 public key from raw 32-byte key or base64 string.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519PublicKey.FromBase64(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an Ed25519 public key from a base64-encoded string.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Ed25519.Ed25519PublicKey.Verify(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.String)
member.summary: Verifies a base64 serialized signature (flag + signature + public key).

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Secp256k1.Secp256k1Impl
member.summary: Secp256k1 (K-256) sign and verify using BouncyCastle. Sui uses 32-byte private key, 33-byte compressed public key, 64-byte compact signature (r || s).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Secp256k1.Secp256k1Impl.GetPublicKey(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Derives the compressed 33-byte public key from a 32-byte private key.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Keypairs.Secp256k1.Secp256k1Impl.Sign(System.Byte[],System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Signs the given digest (32 bytes) and returns a 64-byte compact signature (r || s, big-endian). Uses low-S form.

member.summary: Extracts the normalized object ID from a string (address) or from an object .
member.param: Either an object ID string (normalized) or a call argument that references an object (ImmOrOwned, Shared, or Receiving).
member.returns: Normalized object ID (0x + 64 hex), or null if the argument is not an object reference (e.g. Pure or FundsWithdrawal).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Transactions.TransactionUtils.GetIdFromCallArg(MystenLabs.Sui.Bcs.CallArg)
member.summary: Extracts the normalized object ID from a call argument that references an object.
member.returns: Normalized object ID for Object variants; null for Pure or FundsWithdrawal.

member.name: T:MystenLabs.Sui.Verify.SuiVerify
member.summary: Verifies Sui signatures and reconstructs public keys from serialized signatures. Supports Ed25519 single-signature verification; MultiSig and other schemes are not yet supported.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Verify.SuiVerify.PublicKeyFromRawBytes(MystenLabs.Sui.Cryptography.SignatureScheme,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.String)
member.summary: Builds a public key from raw key bytes for the given signature scheme. Only Ed25519 is supported; other schemes throw .
member.param: Raw public key bytes (e.g. 32 bytes for Ed25519).
Optional address to assert; if provided, the key's Sui address must match.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Verify.SuiVerify.PublicKeyFromSuiBytes(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Builds a public key from Sui-format bytes (one byte scheme flag followed by raw key bytes). Accepts base64-encoded string or raw bytes.
member.param: Base64-encoded Sui public key, or raw Sui bytes (flag + raw key).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Verify.SuiVerify.PublicKeyFromSuiBytes(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.String)
member.summary: Builds a public key from Sui-format bytes (one byte scheme flag followed by raw key bytes).
member.param: Sui public key bytes (flag + raw key).

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Verify.SuiVerify.VerifySignatureAsync(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Verifies a serialized signature over the given message digest and optionally checks the signer address.
member.param: Base64 serialized signature (flag + signature + public key).
Optional address; if set, the recovered public key's Sui address must match.
member.returns: The public key that produced the signature.
member.exception: Signature is invalid for the provided data.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Verify.SuiVerify.VerifyPersonalMessageSignatureAsync(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Verifies a serialized signature over a personal message (intent-wrapped, then hashed).
member.returns: The public key that produced the signature.

member.name: M:MystenLabs.Sui.Verify.SuiVerify.VerifyTransactionSignatureAsync(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Verifies a serialized signature over transaction bytes (digest = TransactionData:: + bytes, then verify).
member.returns: The public key that produced the signature.
